tasks.title: Improve workflow compliance dashboard
tasks.summary: Adding truthful tracking coverage, linkage diagnostics, service health visibility, and deploy guardrails for the Compliance dashboard flow.

tasks.title: Release learning layer workflow
tasks.summary: Committed the learning-layer gateway, curation workflow, outcome-aware ranking, and fallback bootstrap fix; verifying deployment next.

tasks.title: Fix extension TS errors - Express v5 types, OllamaPipeline, test mocks
tasks.summary: Fixed 5 categories of TS errors blocking the VSIX build: (1) OllamaPipeline missing codexBrief/deepseekTask fields - wired up builders and added fields to result type. (2) CodexBriefBuilder circular ref summary.codexBrief - replaced with summary.rawModelOutput. (3) DeepSeekTaskBuilder ref summary.deepseekTask - replaced with summary.suggestedFix. (4) ClineProvider.spec.ts read-only onDidChangeVisibility - fixed with Object.defineProperty. (5) Express v5 req.params typed as string|string[] - fixed all route handlers with Request<{param:string}> generics. Also installed express + @types/express. VSIX 3.53.2 built and installed.

tasks.title: Add SuperRoo webview visibility refresh
tasks.summary: Added a soft recovery refresh when the webview becomes visible again plus an immediate unhydrated handshake retry on document visibility changes.
notes: Switching away from and back to the SuperRoo view now triggers a state resend without destructive reload.
VS Code still needs one reload after VSIX reinstall before this new behavior is active.

tasks.title: Fix SuperRoo webview blackout and finish MCP handoff
tasks.summary: Fixed launch hydration so custom-mode load failures no longer leave the UI blank, added visible loading state, verified focused tests, and reinstalled the repaired VSIX.
notes: Current Codex host session still needs reload to attach the newly configured MCP server.
Installed extension refreshed at 2026-05-17 17:12 local time; VS Code restart/window reload required to load it.

tasks.title: Wire Codex task memory
tasks.summary: Implemented local + VPS persistent Codex task memory, exposed it through MCP and REST fallback, and verified live writes.
